name: PN532 NFC/RFID
description: The `pn532` component allows you to use PN532 NFC/RFID controllers ([datasheet](https://cdn-shop.adafruit.com/datasheets/pn532ds.pdf), [Adafruit](https://www.adafruit.com/product/364)) with ESPHome. This component is a global hub that establishes the connection to the PN532 via [SPI](https://esphome.io/components/spi) or [I²C](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) and outputs its data. Using the [PN532 binary sensors](https://esphome.io/components/binary_sensor/pn532#pn532-tag) you can then create individual binary sensors that track if an NFC/RFID tag is currently detected by the PN532.
